steps.name: Navigate to the prohealth application
Enter practice valid username and password and click on login button
Select apollo and admin values in dropdown
Click on Login button
Mouse hover on settings option
Click on domain values button
Verify address type table and add button is displayed
Verify the list of security domain values are displayed by default
Click on the list of all security values one by one
Navigate to the Prohealth application
Enter practice user valid username admin and password 123qwe and click on login button
Select facility 1 and roles 1 values in dropdowns
Click on the Login button
Navigate to the Prohealth application
Enter practice test valid username admin and password 123qwe and click on login button
Select facility 2 and roles 1 values in dropdowns
Click on the Login button
